question: Will Kompany coach Bayern Munich for at least two full seasons?
resolution_criteria:
Vincent Kompany is Bayern Munich’s new coach. They signed a contract until 30th of June 2027.

The last Bayern coaches didn’t make it until the end of their second full season, even though their contracts were much longer than that. Will Vincent Kompany’s turn be different?

Resolves YES if Kompany is Bayern’s coach on their last game of the season 25/26 (only counting Bundesliga, DFB Pokal, Champions League, Europa League and Conference League)

Resolves NO in all other cases.

I will not bet in this market.
